arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers took deep Celtic breath and asked himself a difficult question in moment of solitude on pitch in Perth
arts.sum: Rodgers wasn't a happy man and admitted he had to swallow some of his 'anger' at full-time

arts.ttl: 'I've seen a trend now' - Rodgers bemoans Celtic start as title party delayed
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers bemoans how Celtic have started recent games his side's expected title party is delayed after losing to St Johnstone

arts.ttl: Celtic Q+A: Brendan Rodgers' stern message to players after defeat vs St Johnstone
arts.sum: Everything Brendan Rodgers said to the media after watching his Celtic side fall to a 1-0 defeat at the hands of St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: 'There's definitely anger' - Brendan Rodgers' brutal summation after Celtic defeat
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has admitted Celtic’s performance against St Johnstone at McDiarmid Park provoked “anger” inside of him, as his side were defeated 1-0 in Perth.

arts.ttl: Simo Valakari revels in Celtic scalping as St Johnstone boss believes great escape is ON
arts.sum: The Saints breathed new life into their bid to beat the drop by shocking the champions in Perth

arts.ttl: What the Celtic pundits said as mentality questioned after St Johnstone defeat and HALF the team name-checked
arts.sum: Neil Lennon, Kris Boyd and James McFadden were on Sky duty and were pinpointed issues for Brendan Rodgers to address

arts.ttl: Balodis helps St Johnstone shock Celtic to keep up Premiership survival hopes
arts.sum: St Johnstone gave themselves some unlikely relegation relief with a stunning 1-0 win against the Scottish Premiership leaders, Celtic, at McDiarmid Park. Daniels Balodis went off-script after four minutes when the defender scored with a header and, while the visitors dominated for the rest of the game, Simo Valakari’s side held out, helped by some vital saves by their goalkeeper Andy Fisher. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Blazing Brendan Rodgers orders Celtic players to get out of their comfort zone as worried boss reveals mentality fears
arts.sum: The Irishman was gutted after his side spurned the chance to clinch the trophy at Parkhead next weekend

arts.ttl: Celtic instant analysis as Brendan Rodgers' sluggish side slump to loss in Perth
arts.sum: Tony Haggerty's instant analysis from McDiarmid Park as Celtic

arts.ttl: Celtic suffer shock defeat at rock-bottom St Johnstone
arts.sum: Celtic still need two wins to secure the Scottish Premiership title after suffering a shock 1-0 defeat at rock-bottom St Johnstone.
